description: A farmer wants to create a flight plan for a drone to scout a 160-acre field for signs of nitrogen stress.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the boundary map for the specified 160-acre field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the field boundary.

nodes.task_description: Generate an optimized flight path for complete coverage of the field at a specified altitude and camera overlap.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an efficient grid pattern flight plan.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the total flight time and number of batteries required for the mission.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an accurate estimate of time and battery needs.
